pools.comment: === VALUABLES POOL === Diamond 5%, Netherite 0.5%, Gold 10%, Iron 15%, Emerald 8%, Lapis 5%
=== ANCIENT DEBRIS POOL === 8-15% chance scaled by luck
=== CONSUMABLES POOL === Golden apples, totems, ender pearls
=== MOB DROPS POOL === Useful crafting materials
=== UTILITY POOL === Shulker box (1-5%), ender chest (3%), compasses (5%), horn (9%)
=== ARMOR POOL === Max 2, quality tiered, includes Golden Apple Helmet
=== WEAPON POOL === Max 2, tiered variants: Thornwood Ballista (weak) / Golden Goliath Ballista (strong)
=== PET POOL - FIRST === Normal chance, uses exquisite pet pool
=== SAVANNA BIOME BLOCKS === Hay blocks, limited 2-4 based on luck

lore.text: and Resistance II for 20 seconds in

pools.comment: === SAVANNA UNIQUE - Pegasus Hack === 50% chance when not vanilla mode
=== LUCK BONUS ROLLS === Extra items based on luck stat
